part_name: Small station square body isolator pad
nominal_dimensions_mm: Square flat pad 70 x 70; free height 22; leave centre undrilled or centre-marked until sleeve OD is known; final hole = sleeve OD + 0.5-1.0
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5
fabrication_method: Longman custom cut/moulded square pad; drill/punch centre hole after sleeve measurement; no tyre/recycled crumb rubber
hold_points: Confirm station footprint, sleeve OD, and final installed stack height after dry-fit
notes: Current tub/chassis evidence does not prove a shaped socket; preferred custom shape is square.

part_name: Large station square body isolator pad
application: Main tub-to-chassis mount stack large pair
nominal_dimensions_mm: Square flat pad 80 x 80; free height 24; leave centre undrilled or centre-marked until sleeve OD is known; final hole = sleeve OD + 0.5-1.0
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5
fabrication_method: Longman custom cut/moulded square pad; drill/punch centre hole after sleeve measurement; no tyre/recycled crumb rubber
hold_points: Confirm large-pair station, station footprint, sleeve OD, and final installed stack height after dry-fit
notes: Current tub/chassis evidence does not prove a shaped socket; preferred custom shape is square.

nominal_dimensions_mm: ID 10.8-11.0 for M10 bolt; OD sets final BM-ISO centre hole; length equals free rubber stack minus 3-4 clamp compression
material: Steel tube, zinc plated or painted after cut
fabrication_method: Cut DOM/mechanical tube; deburr both ends; corrosion protect before assembly
hold_points: Measure old sleeve OD and length with calipers; do not infer sleeve OD only from photos
notes: Sleeve controls over-crush; rubber dimensions alone are not enough for final clamp load.

nominal_dimensions_mm: Inspect existing cup/seat washers; recreate only if cracked, thinned, distorted, or incompatible with the square pad/sleeve stack; M10 clearance hole 11 if replaced
material: Steel, 2.5-3.0 thick, plated or epoxy primed
fabrication_method: Reuse original cups if flat and not thinned; otherwise press/form new cups from steel washer blanks as separate hardware
hold_points: Confirm which old cups are reusable; confirm actual cup/washer dimensions against chassis/body landing surfaces
notes: Washer/cup hardware controls stack crush but does not define Longman rubber outer shape.

nominal_dimensions_mm: Overall length 96; max width 64; free thickness 15; top hole 12; lower hole 12; hole center spacing 64; rectangular relief 36 x 18 with R3 corners; top metal insert/boss OD 29
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; steel insert if original design uses one
fabrication_method: Mould or cut from sheet/blank; punch holes; form rectangular relief cleanly; bond/fit steel insert where required
hold_points: Confirm hole center spacing and insert OD directly from sample with calipers before final pair
notes: This is separate from the six main tub stations and must not be mixed with BM-ISO-SM/BM-ISO-LG pieces.

application: Separate front support/nose-extension strip or bonded liner
nominal_dimensions_mm: Candidate only; quote envelope 165 x 40; base sheet thickness 8; raised/load pad height 14; final outline and holes from physical carrier/location trace only
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR sheet rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5 if confirmed required
tolerance: cut outline +/-1.0 after trace; holes +/-0.5 after trace; thickness +/-0.5
fabrication_method: Do not cut production from the blank; trace actual carrier/location first if the piece is proven required
hold_points: Physical carrier/location proof required before quoting production
notes: Current loose-part photos are mixed with bump-stop fragments.

application: Separate front support/nose-extension strip or bonded liner
nominal_dimensions_mm: Candidate only; mirror FS-STRIP-L only if the physical right-side carrier proves symmetric; final outline and holes from physical carrier/location trace only
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR sheet rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5 if confirmed required
tolerance: cut outline +/-1.0 after trace; holes +/-0.5 after trace; thickness +/-0.5
fabrication_method: Do not cut production from the blank; trace actual carrier/location first if the piece is proven required
hold_points: Physical carrier/location proof required before quoting production
notes: The old right-strip photo is treated as bump-stop evidence first, not a strip master.

source_candidates: ToJo 48304-60010; Cruiser Corps long bump stop
nominal_dimensions_mm: Target free height 70; Toyota-style two-ear steel saddle/backing plate; tapered/radiused progressive rubber body; flat rectangular strike face; base footprint BL x BW from vehicle bracket; bolt/stud pitch P and hole/thread D from vehicle; contact face centred on axle strike pad within +/-5
material: NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5 bonded/captive to new coated steel saddle
tolerance: height +/-1; base/holes +/-0.5 after vehicle release; contact centre +/-5; saddle must not bend; bond/captive joint must survive compression
fabrication_method: Mould/cast Toyota-style progressive tapered bump stop with new steel saddle/backing plate; no simple cut block
hold_points: Measure cleaned bracket, bolt pattern, loaded gap, full-bump clearance, and strike-pad offset before mould release; require sketch/CAD and material declaration
notes: Old decayed rubber is not the master. Use docs/bump-stop-fabrication-spec-20260504.md and bump_stop_vehicle_measurement_control.svg.

nominal_dimensions_mm: Target free height 60; Toyota-style two-ear steel saddle/backing plate; tapered/radiused progressive rubber body; flat rectangular strike face; base footprint BL x BW from right-front bracket; bolt/stud pitch P and hole/thread D from vehicle; contact face centred on axle strike pad within +/-5
material: NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5 bonded/captive to new coated steel saddle
tolerance: height +/-1; base/holes +/-0.5 after vehicle release; contact centre +/-5; saddle must not bend; bond/captive joint must survive compression
fabrication_method: Mould/cast Toyota-style short right-front progressive bump stop with new steel saddle/backing plate; no simple cut block
hold_points: Measure cleaned right-front bracket, bolt pattern, loaded gap, full-bump clearance, and strike-pad offset before mould release; require sketch/CAD and material declaration
notes: Right front is the short 60 mm stop; reject 70 mm aftermarket copies unless deliberately trimmed and released by vehicle test.

source_candidates: ToJo 48304-60010; Cruiser Corps long bump stop
nominal_dimensions_mm: Target free height 70 each; rear pair matched within 1; Toyota-style two-ear steel saddles/backing plates; tapered/radiused progressive rubber bodies; flat rectangular strike faces; base footprint BL x BW from each rear bracket; bolt/stud pitch P and hole/thread D from vehicle; contact faces centred within +/-5
material: NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5 bonded/captive to new coated steel saddles
tolerance: height +/-1; pair height match <=1; hardness spread <=5 Shore A; base/holes +/-0.5 after vehicle release; saddles must not bend; bond/captive joints must survive compression
fabrication_method: Mould/cast Toyota-style progressive matched rear pair with new steel saddles/backing plates; no simple cut blocks
hold_points: Measure cleaned rear brackets, bolt patterns, loaded gaps, full-bump clearances, and strike-pad offsets before mould release; require sketch/CAD and material declaration
notes: Make rear stops as a matched pair after final ride height and axle travel are checked.
